channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Everything to know before putting a car key on your iPhone
item.description: Do you need to be in your car to set up your digital car key?

item.title: A single AI agent conversation can look perfect and still be broken, leaders from LangChain, Conviva and CoreWeave said at VB Transform 2026
item.description: A single AI agent conversation can look flawless scored on its own and still point to a broken product. That gap is driving a shift in how enterprises evaluate agents, away from scoring individual traces and toward comparing cohorts of users against a baseline.At VB Transform 2026, Harrison Chase, CEO of LangChain; Hui Zhang, CTO and co-founder of Conviva; and Emmanuel Turlay, director of engineering at CoreWeave, described that shift, along with a parallel move toward cheaper, narrower judge models.Agent-as-judge — judging one AI agent's output with another — hasn't replaced LLM-as-judge, whi...

item.title: New report claims working late really could help you get promoted - so much for the 'right to switch off'
item.description: Research into the emailing and messaging habits of employees reveals that breaking the work-life balance could get you a promotion

item.title: Adobe crams multiple AI tools into its experimental camera app
item.description: Adobe's Project Indigo app will have new features like removing distractions and offering immediate photo feedback.

item.title: Judge pauses the controversial Paramount-Warner Bros. merger for two weeks
item.description: A judge has paused the Paramount / Warner Bros. deal to review a multi-state lawsuit.

item.title: Judge pauses $110B Paramount-Warner Bros merger
item.description: The lawsuit from the states alleges that the deal would harm movie theaters, basic cable distributors, and audiences.

item.title: Scientists say one everyday habit may be quietly shrinking your brain
item.description: Adults who frequently watched television in midlife later showed brain changes associated with memory loss, stroke risk, and dementia. Winding down looks different for everyone, but it often involves some sort of sitting—it might be sitting back to read a novel or lounging while watching one’s favorite show. But a new study suggests that, despite it being a similar physical task, “not all sitting is created equal.”...

item.title: Will the Gulf Coast tropical depression turn into storm Bertha? Here’s the forecast from NOAA’s hurricane tracker
item.description: States from Texas to Florida can expect high winds and heavy rains, with agencies issuing weather warnings in the region. Summer 2026 has been filled with one extreme weather event after the other, from massive heatwaves and Canadian wildfires to flooding. Now, brace yourself for hurricane season.

item.title: Judge pauses Paramount’s attempt to buy Warner Bros. Discovery
item.description: A judge partially granted the request from a dozen state attorneys general to temporarily place the $110 billion merger of Paramount and Warner Bros. Discovery on hold, as reported by Variety and Reuters. US District Judge Araceli Martínez-Olguín said that based on the new company's market share, "the Court is persuaded that it can presume […]

item.title: Netflix shows its love for AI once again — the platform has acquired Ben Affleck’s firm InterPositive for $587 million, and it’s just given me another reason to cancel my subscription
item.description: Netflix revealed that it bought AI firm InterPositive for $587 million, and subscribers are concerned for future movies and shows.

item.title: 70% of Americans don’t want data centers built nearby, but the government is seizing private property to force construction to start
item.description: 'Eminent domain' is being used to force landowners to sell their personal property to help build infrastructure for data centers.

item.title: Somebody paid nearly $1 million for Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang’s leather jacket. Is it the new Steve Jobs black turtleneck?
item.description: Huang has joined the list of tech moguls whose hand-me-downs go for thousands of dollars at auction. At nearly $10,000 a pop, Tom Ford leather jackets are already pricey. But put one on a tech CEO, and its value will soar even higher—almost a million dollars higher, apparently.

item.title: The Eufy E25 2-in-1 robot vacuum is $400 off at Amazon right now
item.description: As of July 20, you can get the Eufy E25 robot vacuum-mop combo for $599.99, down from $999.99, at Amazon.

item.title: Jimothy the raccoon merch is taking over Etsy and Amazon
item.description: Seattle’s own “Raider of Trash Cans” is joining the ranks of viral animals from Moo Deng to Punch the monkey. Last week, Seattle resident Kiana Hall spotted an oddly bedraggled-looking raccoon running across her backyard. She took a video, posted it on Instagram, and named the creature “Jimothy” in her caption.

item.title: I tested Sony's new entry-level turntable and, though it sounds decent enough, you deserve so much more than a brand logo for this money
item.description: The Sony PS-LX3BT is a competent performer of an entry-level turntable, let down by a cheap chassis and high asking price

item.title: 68 major housing markets where home prices are falling
item.description: After a burst of softening, the count of major metros seeing year-over-year home price declines has stabilized over the past 12 months. But it’s still a soft nationally aggregated market. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: Ofcom promises 'faster Wi-Fi and better mobile performance' in the UK thanks to pioneering 6GHz plan that uses 'air traffic control' wizardry for Wi-Fi and 6G
item.description: Ofcom's moving forward with its 6GHz plan that works like air traffic control for wireless signals.

item.title: Today only: The Ecovacs Goat A2000 LiDAR Pro robot lawn mower is on sale for over $500 off
item.description: The Ecovacs Goat A2000 LiDAR Pro Robot Lawn Mower is on sale at Amazon for $1,498, down from the list price of $1,999.99. That's a 25$ discount.
